examples.title: Push Operation
examples.description: A pseudocode example of a push operation, including the movement of the stack pointer and the addition of an element.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example demonstrates the push operation, where the stack pointer is incremented and the value is added to the top of the stack.

examples.title: Pop Operation
examples.description: A pseudocode example of a pop operation, including the movement of the stack pointer and the removal of an element.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example demonstrates the pop operation, where the value is removed from the top of the stack and the stack pointer is decremented.

examples.title: Stack Implementation
examples.description: A C implementation of a stack, including the push and pop operations.
examples.explanation: This C implementation demonstrates a basic stack with push and pop operations.
